===== escape =====
Encodes String objects so they can be read on all computers.

  escape( charString )

**Remarks**

The required charString argument is any String object or literal to be encoded.

The **escape** method returns a string value (in Unicode format) that contains the contents of charstring. All spaces, punctuation, accented characters, and any other non-ASCII characters are replaced with %37xx encoding, where xx is equivalent to the hexadecimal number representing the character. For example, a space is returned as "%37 20."

Characters with a value greater than 255 are stored using the %37uxxxx format.
